h1.visual_description: Bold, serif font, prefixed with a three-level hierarchical number (e.g., 3.7.3), followed by title text, sometimes ending with an asterisk.
h1.example_text: 3.7.3 Formulae of higher accuracy from Richardson’s extrapolation *

h2.visual_description: Bold, serif font, prefixed with 'Example' followed by a three-level hierarchical number and a descriptive title in parentheses.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Unordered list item using a hyphen as a bullet point.
Formal reference to a mathematical theorem.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX-style block math ($$ ... $$) for centered equations and inline math ($ ... $) for variables and expressions within text.
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Parenthetical numeric references for equations (e.g., (3.10)) and named/numbered references for theorems.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Running header containing the chapter number/title on the left and the page number on the right, separated by a horizontal rule.
